prompt: Using RFdiffusion, design a de novo immunogenic beta-sheet scaffold (60–80 residues) that displays surface-exposed epitopes of Yersinia pestis F1 capsule antigen (Caf1) for subunit vaccine development against plague. The scaffold should stabilise key neutralising epitopes while avoiding non-immunogenic core residues. outline a methodology for: (1) epitope mapping on Caf1 polymer structure using published cryo-EM data, (2) RFdiffusion backbone generation to graft epitope loops, (3) ProteinMPNN sequence design and ESMFold validation. Include discussion of adjuvant requirements and immunogenicity testing strategies.
source_citation: Derived from uniprot (2024_05); target: F1 capsule antigen Caf1; organism: Yersinia pestis; catalogue version v1.0
